column2: geom_line(aes(x = date, y = {{kpi}}, color = `Health Zone`), size = 1.5) +
geom_point(aes(x = date, y = {{kpi}}, color = `Health Zone`), size = 1.5) +
labs(fill = "Health Zone", x = "Health Zone", y = ylab) +
labs(fill = "Health Zone", x = xlab, y = "Health Zone") +
geom_point(aes(y = `Health Zone`, x = {{kpi}}, color = `Health Zone`, alpha = survey), size = 4) +
labs(fill = "Health Zone", x ="%", y = ylab, alpha = "Survey #", color = "Health Zone") +
